whole_image_findings.prompt_alignment: Pass: hyperreal cinematic editorial portrait with clothed blazer, shirt collar, clean face, and controlled head-and-shoulders framing.
whole_image_findings.face: Pass with notes: facial structure is coherent and realistic; skin has slightly more texture and natural variation than the beauty-smoothed v5 note, though still polished.
whole_image_findings.eyes: Pass: irises, catchlights, gaze direction, and eyelid anatomy are readable without the underexposed-eye issue seen before v5.
whole_image_findings.mouth_teeth: Pass: closed lips are natural; no teeth exposure or mouth artifact.
whole_image_findings.hands_feet_anatomy: Not visible: no hands, fingers, feet, toes, or full-body limb anatomy in frame.
whole_image_findings.hair: Pass: hair volume, hairline, and edge detail are coherent with no blocking Canny artifacts.
whole_image_findings.clothing: Pass: blazer texture and white shirt collar are coherent; collar and neck separation are cleaner than the v5 seed 711170102 note.
whole_image_findings.lighting_background: Pass with notes: moody side lighting remains coherent and controlled; right-side background remains dark but not muddy or blocking.
whole_image_findings.control_adherence: Pass: silhouette, crop, hair mass, shoulder line, and vertical background structure follow the cleaned Canny guide without colored control-map staining.
whole_image_findings.artifacts: No blocking artifacts observed. Minor remaining note is a polished/retouched portrait finish rather than fully raw skin texture.

qa_driven_change.reason: V5 robustness QA still noted mild beauty smoothing and one faint lower jaw/collar transition artifact.
qa_driven_change.result: Small local improvement to collar/jaw separation and skin texture without reintroducing bare shoulders, colored control-map stains, or eye underexposure.

not_certified_reasons: This v6 prompt changed after the prior Canny target-runtime smoke, so target-runtime proof must be rerun before certification.
This is a bounded one-sample local QA iteration, not full portfolio or target-runtime certification.
next_action: Treat v6 as the current local Canny request candidate. Do not certify until exact v6 target-runtime static proof, bounded generation, pullback, technical QA, and whole-image visual QA pass.
